title: ehrharta gigantea
intro: Ehrharta gigantea, also known as giant veldt grass or giant veld grass, is a tall grass species native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of promoting expectoration and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Ehrharta gigantea often include infusion, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, though its uses should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
